title: Warhammer Quest - Let’s Play - Part 6
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6SV0Lm47pvY

Daniel (@dungeondive) faces a mounting crisis as the warriors confirm their worst fear—every remaining path is a dead end, and the objective room lies beyond the bottomless pit. The same bridge that killed Saul in the first attempt. With no choice left, they must cross it again.

But first, a spider ambush. Three giant spiders drop in from behind, and the heroes dispatch them easily—only for the power phase to roll another one. A minotaur charges down the corridor, and its arrival triggers the spider's lair event: both warriors are immediately webbed, and six more giant spiders swarm in. Then a paralysis trap freezes Saul for two rounds. Then six orcs join the pile. It's a catastrophic chain of events that transforms a quiet backtrack into a desperate survival fight. The witch hunter is webbed, paralyzed, and surrounded. The barbarian goes berserk at exactly the right moments, chaining deathblows through spiders and orcs. Daniel admits to scaling the minotaur's stats for two-player balance and using the Shield of Deliverance to absorb a killing blow. After several harrowing rounds, the warriors clear every enemy and limp toward the bridge. Both cross safely. The episode ends with relief palpable enough to taste.

----

What's the most ridiculous chain of bad luck you've ever experienced in a dungeon crawler—where event after event just kept piling on?
